'''Chav''' was the tenth and last [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Dathomir system/Legends|Dathomir system]],<ref name="TEA" /> a part of the [[Quelii sector/Legends|Quelii sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. A world made of barren rock, it had two [[Moon/Legends|moons]] and [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Domir/Legends|Domir]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Chav was first mentioned in ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'', a [[2004]] sourcebook for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'', published by [[Wizards of the Coast]].<ref name="GatORW">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref> The [[2009]] book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Dathomir [[Star system/Legends|system]], and thus Chav, in grid square O-6.<ref name="TEA" />
